Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First the user wants 20 open ended thought provoking questions based on the pseudo BPMN representation of a smartphone supply chain process

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Focusing on creating 20 open ended thought provoking questions for the smartphone supply chain process

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ensuring questions explore the rationale behind each step in the pseudo BPMN representation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Prioritizing questions that prompt deeper analysis like Why was this step prioritized in the supply chain

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
